issues.issue: Types in 'with' clause of public package section is not used.
Communication_Properties in 'with' clause of public package section is a predeclared property set and is not needed.
left and right sides of binary expression '*' are of type 'real' and '<error>', but must be of the same type
left and right sides of binary expression '*' are of type 'real' and 'Types::speed.speed_impl', but must be of the same type
left side of binary expression '-' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' but must be of type'int' or 'real'
named thing must be an expression with a type
right side of binary expression '*' is of type '<error>' but must be of type'int' or 'real'
right side of binary expression '*' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' but must be of type'int' or 'real'
right side of binary expression '-' is of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' but must be of type'int' or 'real'
It is recommended that guarantee statements be named. (Hint: an identifier may be placed between the "guarantee" keyword and the quoted description.)
